message:
feat(metrics): add RuntimeMetricsCollector and MetricsServer modules

crates/wa-core/src/metrics.rs (new):
- RuntimeMetricsCollector: implements Prometheus collector interface,
  exposes ingest lag, segments persisted, events recorded gauges
- MetricsServer: HTTP server for Prometheus /metrics endpoint with
  configurable bind address and metric prefix

crates/wa/src/main.rs:
- Wrap runtime handle in Arc for sharing with metrics collector
- Adjust collector construction to use Arc::clone

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
